us_markets.note: Thursday session data from CNBC live updates
us_markets.key_story: Cisco +15% on earnings beat, DJIA tops 50K. US retail sales +0.5% (in-line). Import prices +1.9% MoM (highest since Oct 2022). Jobless claims 211K (above est 205K). Trump-Xi summit in Beijing ongoing.

geopolitics.trump_xi_summit: Two-day Beijing meeting. Topics: Taiwan, trade, AI chips, rare earths, Iran. AI protocol agreed. US cleared ~10 Chinese firms for H200 chips (no deliveries yet). Strait of Hormuz must remain open - agreed.
